chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Product
triplets.object: ordered but remain for historical reference

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: Customer, items, payment status, and delivery information

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean attribute indicating whether the entity is currently active (true) or inactive (false) and thus eligible for operations such as ordering or sale.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address is the delivery address on file for a customer used for shipments, with a customer potentially having multiple addresses and one primary per type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Cust

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY represents the category master data: each record corresponds to a category with a unique integer CATEGORY_ID and a human-readable CATEGORY_NAME.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_ID is the unique numeric identifier (primary key) assigned to each order in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | **Key Attributes**:
- Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item in a sales order that records a specific product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a customer-initiated transaction in an e-commerce system representing a request to purchase goods or services, which is processed for fulfillment and shipment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is the monetary transaction record associated with a Sales Order, identified by a unique PAYMENT_ID, containing the payment amount, and allowing one Sales Order to have one or more Payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Key Attributes:
- Payment amount | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product display name: the human-readable name used to display the product in catalogs and interfaces.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is a business entity representing a discrete delivery of goods associated with a Sales Order, including its origin warehouse and destination customer address.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Key Attributes:
- Destination Customer Address | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database table representing the hierarchical product category taxonomy, identified by CATEGORY_ID, where PARENT_CATEGORY_ID links to other records to form a tree.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | **Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master table/record for all registered platform customers, identified by the primary key CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For Tax
entities_post_resolution.definition: An attribute identifying the geographic region used to determine tax calculations for a transaction or taxpayer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: Price per unit of a product on a sales order line item, used together with quantity to determine the line’s total value.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Key Attributes:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: Region code identifying the geographic area used for tax calculations.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Policy detailing the conditions and timeframe for returning products and obtaining refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.definition:

- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Audit Purposes
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes

entities_post_resolution.name: Does Not Change
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Ordered But Remain

entities_post_resolution.name: Price At Time
entities_post_resolution.definition: Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional grouping, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, catalog numbers, names, category association, price, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores category information for products, including hierarchical relationships to a parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for sales orders, linking each order to a customer, recording the order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line items for each order, including product, quantity, pricing, and the line-level total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including where and when items were shipped, tracking details, and current shipment status.
